name: 7b — Find weekly reports (search every site's library)

parameters.content:
## Find the weekly reports
Run it (takes a minute or two — it searches every team site's document library for files matching **'weekly'**).

Node 4 gives one flat list: site · file name · folder · last modified · link. Copy the rows that are the real weekly delivery reports and send them to BraindAI — the ingest workflow (poll folder → pull content → attach to account context) gets built against exactly those folders.

No hits / wrong hits? Change `q='weekly'` in node 3 to e.g. `q='report'` and rerun.
